paired_card.line: Last year's work, exactly where you left it.

copy: The orchard comes back into bloom, the same paths through the same green. Last year's work, exactly where you left it.
alt: A picturesque landscape of blossoming fruit trees spreads across gentle hills. Paths wind through the flowering trees and the green meadow glowing in the sunlight.
alt_product: moodcase library view showing last season's blossom-orchard shot, exactly where you left it.
